category_sources: source_facts.description says wolfMQTT is a small, portable MQTT client C implementation; official wolfMQTT manual describes an MQTT client library written in C.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and official wolfSSL documentation use the camel-cased display name wolfMQTT.
docs_sources: Official wolfSSL documentation site hosts the wolfMQTT manual with introduction, build, getting-started, design, and API sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official wolfMQTT manual describe a portable C MQTT client for constrained M2M/IoT environments.
